commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Diagnose plugin, toolchain, and target repository readiness.

commands.name: commands
commands.description: List available wrapper commands and their metadata.
commands.output: human list or command manifest JSON

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Run simple_model validate, check-all, lint, and drift summaries.

commands.name: full-check
commands.description: Run the full simple_model validation and test suite.

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Draft a struct model from an existing repository.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Report source files not represented by struct component paths.

commands.name: interfaces
commands.description: Scan public interfaces and compare them with struct exports.

commands.name: facts
commands.description: Emit normalized code facts for a target repository.

commands.name: pr-gate
commands.description: Run impact, interface/dependency gates, risk, tests, and review routing.

commands.name: dashboard
commands.description: Generate a static Project Intelligence dashboard.
